title: Refactor a LiveView to use stream :limit for pagination
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/paginated_stream_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.PaginatedStreamLive) that uses stream(:rows, initial_rows, limit: 50) to cap the client-side DOM size to 50. Loading more rows uses stream_insert with at: -1 and the stream automatically prunes the oldest. mount/3 builds the initial stream with limit: 50. handle_event("load_more") calls stream_insert in a loop.
tier_rationale: stream/3 :limit option is a specific feature that many devs (and LLMs) miss.
